normalized_title: City of Melville Local Planning Scheme No. 6 - Scheme Map No. 5 of 8 (Kardinya Locality)
version_date: Plot date 07 November 2024 (Version No 1; LPS6 gazetted Friday 27 May 2016)
scope_summary: Statutory scheme map sheet 5 of 8 under the City of Melville Local Planning Scheme No. 6 covering the Kardinya locality. Depicts local scheme zones and reserves (including district distributor roads and public open space), Metropolitan Region Scheme region reserves, R-Codes density codings, and the AR1 additional-requirements area for the Kardinya Activity Centre Plan. Used to determine the zoning and density coding applicable to individual lots in Kardinya.
quality_flags: scheme map drawing: low text volume is expected; extracted text is map labels and legend only

OCR of map labels yields fragmented and reversed street-name strings (e.g. 'G NINNUB', 'ATTY E ECALP'); spatial zoning/coding assignments are not recoverable from text alone - use the original PDF or GIS data for lot-level determinations
